title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 5–8, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. After the fight, the Baratie shifts from survival to Sanji’s unresolved bond with Zeff and the cooks.

dialogue.speaker: Patty
dialogue.text: pathy, Carne! Give them the boat we use to go out and buy ingredients.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why the hell do we have to give a boat to the very pirates that attacked us!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How're we gonna buy food supplies if we give them our boat, you numbstill!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those scum can swim away for all we care!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shut up and give them the damn boat already!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why that son of a...! I swear I'm going to kill that bastard one day!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: But he's inherited the owner's legendary kicks!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If we're gonna get'im, then now's our best chance since he's all injured!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe if 15 of us cooks attack him while he's sleeping... then we just might win.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you woke up, did you now?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sorry but we've run out of more bandages.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All those things seem so stupid...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shanks again. It's alright if I don't return this boat, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you have the balls to come back and return it, go ahead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Get it through your thick heads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: this is "barate," the fightin' restaurant of the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Let's meet again out on the grand line,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: is what gin said before leaving.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: cool, he said that to you?

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
